page.title: Organization Telemetry & Analytics
page.description: Configure telemetry settings for your entire organization. Telemetry is enabled by default to improve the platform, but users can opt-out individually unless you disable this option.

enableTelemetry.title: Enable Telemetry
enableTelemetry.description: Allow collection of anonymous usage data to improve the platform (enabled by default)

allowUserOptOut.title: Allow User Opt-Out
allowUserOptOut.description: Allow individual users to opt-out of telemetry collection

alerts.enabled: ✓ Telemetry enabled. All categories are enabled by default for new users, but they can opt-out individually if desired.
alerts.centralizedControl: Centralized control: Users cannot opt-out individually. Ensure compliance with local privacy regulations.

anonymization.title: Data Anonymization Level
anonymization.description: Choose how much data to anonymize before collection

collectItems.performance: • Performance metrics (page load times, API response times)
collectItems.usage: • Feature usage patterns (which features are used)

errors.loadTenantTelemetrySettings: Failed to load tenant telemetry settings

descriptions.outbound: Configure SMTP or API settings for sending emails from your application
descriptions.inbound: Configure email providers to receive and process emails as tickets

descriptions.smtp: Configure traditional SMTP email server settings
descriptions.resend: Configure Resend API for modern email delivery

fromAddress.label: From Address
fromAddress.help: Must be from a verified domain. Use the Domains tab to add custom domains.

microsoft365.description: Runs a live Graph check (including create+delete subscription) to diagnose mailbox, folder, and permission issues.

note.label: Note:
note.body: Diagnostics will create a temporary Microsoft Graph subscription and then delete it. If deletion fails, you may need to manually remove the subscription in Microsoft 365.

header.title: Inbound Ticket Defaults
header.description: Configure default values for tickets created from email processing

form.description: Configure the default values that will be applied to tickets created from email processing

empty.title: No ticket defaults configured
empty.description: Create your first configuration to define default values for email-generated tickets

items.providerReference: • Each email provider can reference one ticket defaults configuration
items.requiredValues: • When an email creates a ticket, these defaults provide required field values
items.systemCreator: • System-generated tickets will show "System" as the creator when entered_by is null
items.scenarios: • You can create different defaults for different email scenarios (support, billing, etc.)

templateSummaries.ownOrAssigned: records owned by or assigned to the principal
templateSummaries.ownOrManaged: records owned by the principal or managed users
templateSummaries.sameClient: records in the same client scope
templateSummaries.clientPortfolio: records for the principal client portfolio
templateSummaries.sameTeam: records owned by the same team

upsell.title: Authorization bundles
upsell.description: Advanced Authorization Bundle management is available on the Premium tier. Upgrade to manage reusable narrowing bundles.

hero.title: Authorization bundles
hero.subtitle: Manage premium access narrowing with draft revisions, scoped assignments, and safe simulation from one control center.

activeBundles.title: Active bundles
activeBundles.subtitle: Reusable narrowing bundles currently available to assign

activeAssignments.title: Active assignments
activeAssignments.subtitle: Live role, team, user, and API key rollouts

starterBundles.title: Starter bundles
starterBundles.subtitle: Bundled relationship-first presets ready to adapt

archivedBundles.title: Archived bundles
archivedBundles.subtitle: Retired bundles preserved for audit and reuse

library.title: Authorization bundle library
library.description: Browse bundle status, manage lifecycle changes, and open a focused workspace for one bundle at a time.
library.searchPlaceholder: Search bundles by name or description

descriptions.customBundle: Custom narrowing bundle for role, team, user, or API key assignments.

library.effectiveSummary: Effective summary: {{status}} bundle with {{count}} active assignment(s).

workspace.fallbackDescription: Use the draft editor, assignment manager, and simulator to ship safe narrowing changes.

editor.editingDraftSuffix: . Changes stay in draft until published.
editor.viewingPublishedSuffix: . No active draft revision exists right now.

ruleForm.helperEditPublished: Saving will create a new draft revision with your changes to this published rule.
ruleForm.helperCreateDraft: Saving will create a new draft revision for this bundle.

rule.removePublishedTooltip: Create a new draft revision that removes this published rule.

redaction.label: Redacted fields
redaction.helper: Comma-separated field names to redact when this rule allows access.

assignments.description: View and manage role, team, user, and API-key targets currently affected by this bundle.
assignments.empty: No assignments for this bundle yet.

simulator.description: Simulate draft vs published bundle behavior against a real principal and existing record.
simulator.empty: Run a simulation to compare draft and published behavior.

createDialog.title: Create Authorization Bundle
createDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: Reusable narrowing bundle for a specific team, client group, or workflow.

errors.selectTemplate: Select a template before saving a rule.
errors.selectClientRequired: Add at least one selected client before saving this rule.
errors.selectBoardRequired: Add at least one selected board before saving this rule.
errors.redactedFieldRequired: Enter at least one redacted field before saving this rule.
errors.selectTarget: Select a target before adding an assignment.
errors.selectPrincipal: Select a principal before running simulation.
errors.selectRecord: Select a record before running simulation.
